typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		LAST_NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_NAME as string,
		EMPL_STATUS as string,
		IS_TCOO as integer,
		EMPLID as string,
		FIRST_NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_NAME as string,
		IS_PLATFORM_APP_SVCS as integer,
		NAME as string,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID as integer,
		SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID as integer,
		EMAIL_ID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'parquet') ~> GetHRCoreCommonUpdates
GetHRCoreCommonUpdates sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		lastName = LAST_NAME,
		level3Org = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_NAME,
		level4Org = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_NAME,
		employeeStatus = EMPL_STATUS,
		isTcoo = IS_TCOO,
		emplId = EMPLID,
		firstName = FIRST_NAME,
		level3Mgr = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_NAME,
		level4Mgr = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_NAME,
		isPlatformAppServices = IS_PLATFORM_APP_SVCS,
		name = NAME,
		level3MgrEmplid = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_03_MGR_ID,
		level4MgrEmplid = SPRVS_ORG_LVL_04_MGR_ID,
		email = EMAIL_ID
	)) ~> OLEDBDestination
